options.label: Overview
options.clause: Provide a comprehensive overview of {primary_topic}

options.label: Research Summary
options.clause: Provide a detailed research summary about {primary_topic}

options.label: Explainer
options.clause: Explain {primary_topic} in a clear, accessible way

options.label: Comparison
options.clause: Compare and contrast {primary_topic} with {compare_to}

options.label: Timeline / History
options.clause: Provide a chronological timeline of key developments in {primary_topic}

options.label: Case Study
options.clause: Present a detailed case study analysis of {primary_topic}

options.label: Summarize
options.clause: Summarize the key points concisely

options.label: Analyze
options.clause: Provide in-depth analysis with supporting evidence

options.label: Compare
options.clause: Compare different viewpoints and approaches

options.label: Explain
options.clause: Explain the concepts clearly with examples

options.label: Predict / Forecast
options.clause: Provide predictions and forecasts based on current trends

options.label: Academic Papers
options.clause: Draw from academic papers and peer-reviewed research

options.label: News Sources
options.clause: Reference recent news articles and journalism

options.label: Government / Official
options.clause: Prioritize government reports and official data sources

options.label: Industry Reports
options.clause: Use industry reports and market analysis

options.label: Mixed Sources
options.clause: Draw from a diverse mix of credible sources

options.label: Last Week
options.clause: Focus on information from the past week

options.label: Last Month
options.clause: Focus on information from the past month

options.label: Last Quarter
options.clause: Focus on information from the past three months

options.label: Last Year
options.clause: Focus on information from the past year

options.label: Historical / All Time
options.clause: Include historical context and long-term trends

options.label: Inline Citations
options.clause: Include inline citations for all claims and data points

options.label: Footnotes
options.clause: Provide footnotes with source references

options.label: Bibliography
options.clause: Include a bibliography of all sources at the end

options.label: Links Only
options.clause: Provide direct links to sources where possible

options.label: Paragraphs
options.clause: Format the response in well-structured paragraphs

options.label: Bullet Points
options.clause: Format the response as organized bullet points

options.label: Numbered List
options.clause: Format the response as a numbered list

options.label: Table Format
options.clause: Present the information in a structured table format

options.label: Q&A Format
options.clause: Structure the response as a Q&A format

options.label: Brief (1-2 paragraphs)
options.clause: Keep the response brief — 1 to 2 paragraphs

options.label: Moderate
options.clause: Provide a moderately detailed response

options.label: Detailed
options.clause: Provide a detailed, thorough response

options.label: Comprehensive / In-Depth
options.clause: Provide a comprehensive, in-depth response covering all relevant aspects

options.label: Beginner
options.clause: Write for a beginner audience with no prior knowledge assumed

options.label: Intermediate
options.clause: Write for an audience with intermediate knowledge of the subject

options.label: Expert / Technical
options.clause: Write for an expert audience comfortable with technical details

options.label: General Public
options.clause: Write for a general audience in accessible language

options.label: Professional
options.clause: Use a professional tone throughout your response

options.label: Conversational
options.clause: Write in a conversational, approachable style

options.label: Academic
options.clause: Use an academic, scholarly tone

options.label: Journalistic
options.clause: Write in an objective, journalistic style

options.label: Neutral / Balanced
options.clause: Maintain a strictly neutral and balanced perspective

options.label: United States
options.clause: Focus on the United States context and perspective

options.label: Europe
options.clause: Focus on the European context and perspective

options.label: Asia
options.clause: Focus on the Asian context and perspective

options.label: Global
options.clause: Provide a global perspective covering multiple regions

options.label: Local / Regional
options.clause: Focus on local and regional developments

baseTemplate: Provide a comprehensive overview of {primary_topic}, covering key concepts, recent developments, and important context.
closingLine: Focus on delivering substantive, well-organized knowledge.
